column1: #   - Each row defines one forecast week for one scenario.
#   - 'week_end_date' : leave blank to auto-generate consecutive Fridays from today.
#   - 'policy_rate' : BI benchmark rate in % (e.g. 5.75). Leave blank to carry
#                     forward the last observed rate from macro_shocks.csv.
#   - You do NOT need to fill all 8 weeks — missing rows are padded with the last
#     row of the scenario. Extra rows beyond FORECAST_WEEKS are truncated.
